title: Hit "escape" to exit the search bar.
excerpt: Hey Monday team! Love that I can use a lot of keyboard commands to navigate and be active within the platform. I have noticed though when I am on a board if I do command+F to search that hitting escape won’t remove me fr…

posts.author: jsmith91 (Jarod Smith)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Monday team! Love that I can use a lot of keyboard commands to navigate and be active within the platform. I have noticed though when I am on a board if I do command+F to search that hitting escape won’t remove me from the search bar. While one click isnt that big of a deal it would be nice to not need to leave my keyboard.
